cover: Enterprise architecture diagram on deep Salesforce navy (#032D60) background with subtle dot-grid. Bright Salesforce sky-blue (#00A1E0) glowing header: 'Master Data Management on Salesforce'. Subtitle in white: 'Golden record, duplicate prevention, survivorship, and identity graph patterns that scale'. Top-right: circular avatar badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. THREE BRIGHT LAYERS with glowing rounded borders: TOP LAYER 'Engagement Systems' vivid cyan/blue border — modules 'Sales Cloud Accounts', 'Service Contacts', 'Partner Portal Users' as bright white pill badges with micro icons. MID LAYER 'MDM Control Plane' vivid purple border — modules 'Match Rules', 'Survivorship Engine', 'Stewardship Queue' as bright white pills. BOTTOM LAYER 'Enterprise Data Plane' vivid teal/green border — modules 'ERP Customer', 'Data 360 Identity', 'Warehouse Zero Copy' as bright white pills. Central glowing node: 'Golden Record' in Salesforce sky-blue circle with lightning bolt icon, bright dotted connector arrows flowing to all layers. RIGHT PANEL orange border: 'MuleSoft APIs' and 'Platform Events'. BOTTOM STRIP teal background: 'Record Lifecycle' → 'Match' → 'Survive' → 'Sync' with flow arrows. Salesforce cloud watermark very subtle bottom-left. High contrast, sharp rendering, publication-ready.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce MDM Pattern Decision Matrix'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce MDM Pattern Decision Matrix'. Subtitle 'Choose where the golden record lives before building duplicate rules'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Salesforce-native with cloud icon', 'External MDM hub with database icon', 'Hybrid mastering with branching icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD ARCHITECTURE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD ARCHITECTURE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'Account.Id = enterpriseCustomerId; merge all similar names;' right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'Account.MDM_Party_Id__c = hub.partyId; Account.Source_System__c = event.source;'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Define entity type', 'Assign attribute ownership', 'Separate identity from hierarchy'. Footer bar: 'Golden records fail when identity design is skipped'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Duplicate Candidate Generation That Scales'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Duplicate Candidate Generation That Scales'. Subtitle 'Blocking keys first, scoring second, steward review before merge'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K records: native duplicate rules with shield icon', '100K records: async candidate generation with queue icon', '10M records: partitioned blocking keys with event bus icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD MATCHING' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD MATCHING' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'for (Account a : Trigger.new) { [SELECT Id FROM Account WHERE Name LIKE :a.Name]; }' right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'WHERE Website_Domain__c IN :domains OR Postal_Country_Block__c IN :blocks WITH USER_MODE'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Do not fuzzy scan all Accounts', 'Score candidates asynchronously', 'Create MDM_Match_Candidate__c'. Footer bar: 'Scale comes from reducing the search space'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
